summary: Impressions surged 54% in FY24 as DVS diversified its marketing channels, then declined over the next two years — DVS attributes the FY25 dip to reaching "the upper limits of existing tools and tactics," and the further FY26 drop to a deliberate strategy shift away from paid social media promotion toward in-person outreach events instead.

sources.label: DVS, Preliminary Fiscal 2026 Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing overall, though DVS has since shifted focus to in-person outreach
